name: feishu-bridge
description: Single-plugin marketplace for feishu-bridge: bind a local Claude Code session to a Feishu/Lark group (build-in-public bridge).

plugins.name: feishu-bridge
plugins.description: 把本地 Claude Code session 与飞书群一一绑定的 build-in-public 桥:群内 @bot 消息投递进 session,每轮最终输出自动转发回群;owner 消息直投,其他成员消息由 owner 点卡片审批。仅管群聊(chat_type=group)。
